mapper.select: SELECT a.id AS id, u.name AS userName, a.work_date AS workDate, a.clock_in AS clockIn, a.clock_out AS clockOut, a.is_late AS isLate, a.is_early_leave AS isEarlyLeave, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (a.break_end - a.break_start)) / 60 AS breakTimeMinutes, a.break_start AS breakStart, a.break_end AS breakEnd, mu.name AS modifiedBy, a.modified_at AS modifiedAt FROM attendance a LEFT JOIN users u ON a.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN users mu ON a.modified_by = mu.id

SELECT a.id AS id, u.name AS userName, a.work_date AS workDate, a.clock_in AS clockIn, a.clock_out AS clockOut, a.is_late AS isLate, a.is_early_leave AS isEarlyLeave, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (a.break_end - a.break_start)) / 60 AS breakTimeMinutes, a.break_start AS breakStart, a.break_end AS breakEnd, mu.name AS modifiedBy, a.modified_at AS modifiedAt FROM attendance a LEFT JOIN users u ON a.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN users mu ON a.modified_by = mu.id WHERE user_id = #{id};
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO attendance (user_id, work_date, clock_in, clock_out, is_late, modified_by, modified_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{workDate}, #{clockIn}, #{clockOut}, #{isLate}, #{modifiedBy}, #{modifiedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE attendance SET clock_in = #{clockIn}, clock_out = #{clockOut}, work_date = #{workDate}, modified_by = #{modifiedBy}, modified_at = #{modifiedAt}, is_early_leave = #{isEarlyLeave}, is_late = #{isLate}, break_start = #{breakStart}, break_end = #{breakEnd} WHERE id = #{id}
